g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Map layer — current state of AI')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Compass layer — decision principles')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Engine layer — the update process')
sendPrompt('How does AI-assisted search act as a sensor for this system?')
sendPrompt('What human observation inputs matter for this system?')
sendPrompt('How does community and peer knowledge act as a sensor?')
sendPrompt('How does the decision core work — sensing, deciding, acting?')
sendPrompt('How does updating the Map work as an actuator?')
sendPrompt('What does it mean to rebuild infrastructure as an actuator?')
sendPrompt('How does rewriting the compass work as an actuator?')

svg.text: You are the navigator. The system is the vessel.
